_readme: Free MCP stack — genuinely zero-cost, no subscriptions required.
SEC EDGAR: public US government API, called directly via N8N HTTP Request node.
Yahoo Finance: public query endpoints, called directly via N8N HTTP Request node.
OpenBB: open-source, installed on Oracle Cloud instance via pip, called via N8N Execute Command node.
Alpha Vantage + FMP + FRED: free API keys (register once, no credit card).
Crunchbase and Brave Search removed — their free tiers are not usable for production.
No containers required. All connections run through N8N nodes directly.

sec-edgar._replaces: daloopa + aiera (fundamentals, filings, earnings press releases)
sec-edgar._auth: NO_AUTH — public US government API, no key, no registration
_n8n_setup: Add header inline on the node — no N8N credential object needed

yahoo-finance._replaces: morningstar + lseg (real-time quotes, market cap, price history)
yahoo-finance._auth: NO_AUTH — public Yahoo Finance query endpoints, no key required
_n8n_setup: Add header inline on the node — no N8N credential object needed
No rate limit documented; use responsibly (max ~2000 req/day per IP)

openbb._replaces: morningstar (ratios, screeners, ETF holdings, portfolio analytics)
openbb._auth: NO_AUTH — open-source Python SDK, self-installed on Oracle Cloud
_n8n_setup: Install on Oracle Cloud: pip install openbb
Node type: Execute Command (N8N self-hosted only)
Command: python3 -c "from openbb import obb; import json; print(json.dumps(obb.equity.price.quote('IONQ').to_dict()))"
Or: create a small Flask wrapper on Oracle Cloud and call it via HTTP Request node
No N8N credential needed for local Execute Command
For HTTP wrapper: no auth header needed if running on same Oracle instance

alpha-vantage._replaces: factset (historical OHLCV price series, EPS, adjusted closes)
alpha-vantage._auth: FREE API KEY — register at https://alphavantage.co (no credit card, 25 req/day)
_n8n_setup: N8N Credential: create 'Query Auth' credential — Parameter=apikey, Value=YOUR_KEY
Or: store key in N8N environment variable AV_API_KEY and reference as {{$env.AV_API_KEY}}

fmp._replaces: sp-global (income statement, balance sheet, cash flow, key ratios)
fmp._auth: FREE API KEY — register at https://financialmodelingprep.com (no credit card, 250 req/day)
_n8n_setup: N8N Credential: create 'Query Auth' credential — Parameter=apikey, Value=YOUR_KEY
Or: store key in N8N environment variable FMP_API_KEY and reference as {{$env.FMP_API_KEY}}

frb-fred._replaces: moodys + lseg (yield curves, credit spreads, FX rates, macro indicators)
frb-fred._auth: FREE API KEY — register at https://fred.stlouisfed.org/docs/api/api_key.html (no credit card, unlimited)
_n8n_setup: N8N Credential: create 'Query Auth' credential — Parameter=api_key, Value=YOUR_KEY
Or: store key in N8N environment variable FRED_API_KEY

google-drive._replaces: egnyte + chronograph (document management, portfolio tracking sheets)
google-drive._auth: OAuth2 — use existing Google account, no cost
_n8n_setup: Node type: Google Drive (built-in N8N node)
N8N Credential: Google OAuth2 — already available in N8N credentials panel
No API key needed — OAuth2 flow handles auth via your Google account
Use Google Sheets node for portfolio tracking workbooks

filesystem._replaces: egnyte (local file access for templates, output files)
_n8n_setup: Not called via N8N — this runs as a local stdio MCP process via Claude Code or Claude Desktop
Configure in Claude Desktop: add to mcpServers in claude_desktop_config.json

ecb-sdw._replaces: market data providers (macroeconomic indicators, interest rates)
ecb-sdw._auth: NO_AUTH — European Central Bank Statistical Data Warehouse, public API
_n8n_setup: Returns XML by default, add ?format=jsondata for JSON

eurostat._replaces: economic data providers (EU-wide statistics, GDP, inflation)
eurostat._auth: NO_AUTH — Eurostat public REST API, no registration needed

esma-esef._replaces: EU company filings (alternative to SEC EDGAR for European issuers)
esma-esef._auth: NO_AUTH — ESMA public register, no key required
_n8n_setup: Query parameters for filtering by date, issuer LEI
Note: ESEF data requires parsing iXBRL format

boe-api._replaces: UK macroeconomic data (Bank of England statistical database)
boe-api._auth: NO_AUTH — Bank of England public API, no registration
_n8n_setup: Query by series code (e.g., IUDBEDR for base rate)

ons-api._replaces: UK economic statistics (Office for National Statistics)
ons-api._auth: NO_AUTH — ONS public API, no authentication needed
